name: No memory
definition: Wrong persona profile only; no feedback memory is retrieved.

name: Positive-only memory
definition: Stores only successful or preference-style positive examples.

name: Error memory
definition: Stores structured diagnostic error feedback when the model repeats the wrong prior.

name: Mixed memory
definition: Stores diagnostic error feedback plus positive examples when available.

name: Direct Correction Baseline
definition: Provides the corrected fact directly as a baseline, without relying on accumulated feedback events.
